title: CAG Reopens Expression of Willingness for Empanelled CA Firms for FY 2026-27 Audits of Autonomous & Other Bodies
content:
# CAG Reopens Expression of Willingness for Empanelled CA Firms for FY 2026-27 Audits of Autonomous & Other Bodies

Ek important update hai. Comptroller and Auditor General (CAG) ne empanelled CA firms se Financial Year 2026-27 ke Autonomous and other Bodies ki audits ke liye Expression of Willingness (EoW) dobara invite kiya hai. Ye उन firms ke liye ek critical opportunity hai jo government audit assignments seekh rahe hain.

Here are the key details:

*   Initially, the Expression of Willingness (EoW) document for the engagement of CA firms for Financial Audit of Autonomous and other Bodies for AAP 2026-27 was issued on February 27, 2026, with a last submission date of March 09, 2026 (2:00 PM).
*   The CAG has now reopened the window for submission of this Expression of Willingness.
*   The **revised last date for submitting the Expression of Willingness is March 29, 2026, by 6:00 PM**.
*   This reopening specifically pertains to the audit of financial statements of autonomous or other bodies. Empanelled CA firms should take note of this extended timeline to submit their willingness.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://cag.gov.in/en/whats-new)

*Published on: 22 March 2026*
